basic_details.job_title: Army Law College Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Army Law College Pune Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website of Army Law College Pune. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the ALCP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have qualifications such as LLM, MBA, MA, M.Sc, NET, SET, PhD, MP Ed, or equivalent qualifications as per UGC, SPPU, and BCI norms are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor and other vacancies. The email application process for Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 26-05-2026. Candidates can downl

qualification.education_qualification: BBA LLB and BA LLB, M.A, M.Sc, Ph.D
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Law): LLM, NET or SET or PhD in Law Assistant Professor (Sociology): MA (Sociology), NET or SET or PhD in Sociology Assistant Professor (Law): LLM, NET or SET or PhD Assistant Professor (Management): MBA or MMS, NET or SET or PhD College Director Physical Education & Sports: MP Ed, NET or SET or PhD OR An Asian Game or Commonwealth Games medal winner who has a degree at least at Post Graduation level Psychologist/Counsellor (Female): PG in Psychology/PhD (Psychology) Info & Tech (IT) -Faculty: M Sc (Computer Science) Visiting Faculty (Law): LLM Practicing Advocate Preferred Placement Officer: Bachelor’s Degree (Preferably LLB or MBA/HR Marketing)

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor (Law) (SL No. 1): As per UGC & AWES Norms Assistant Professor (Sociology) (SL No. 2): As per UGC & AWES Norms Assistant Professor (Law) (SL No. 3): ₹ 57,700/- Consolidated Assistant Professor (Management) (SL No. 4): ₹ 57,700/- Consolidated College Director Physical Education & Sports (SL No. 5): ₹ 57,700/- Consolidated Psychologist/Counsellor (Female) (SL No. 6): ₹ 57,700/- Consolidated Info & Tech (IT) -Faculty (SL No. 7): ₹ 57,700/- Consolidated Visiting Faculty (Law) (SL No. 8): As per AWES Norms for CHB Placement Officer (SL No. 9): ₹ 80,000/- Consolidated

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Law College Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Army Law College Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Army Law College Pune Recruitment 2026 is 26-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor (Law) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for various posts at Army Law College Pune, including Assistant Professor (Law) and other related positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Professor posts ranges from Rs. 57,700 to Rs. 80,000 per month, depending on the specific post and consolidated pay structure.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, but generally include LLM, MA, MBA, or equivalent degrees, along with NET, SET, or PhD as per UGC, SPPU, and BCI norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Army Law College Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Army Law College Pune located?
faq.answer: Army Law College Pune is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 412106.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits or age relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply for multiple posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly state whether candidates can apply for multiple posts. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific guidelines on applying for more than one position.
